about.title: About Us
about.description: {siteName} is a community driven list of tools and resources for developers.

advertise.title: Advertise

cta.title: Need a custom partnership?
cta.description: Tell us more about your company and we will get back to you as soon as possible.

testimonial.quote: After advertising on this platform, we saw a 38% increase in qualified leads and 2.4x ROI within the first month. The targeted audience was exactly what our business needed. Highly recommended!

success.title: Thank you for your payment!

login.title: Sign In

verify.description: Check your inbox to sign in to {siteName}.
verify.instructions: We've sent you a magic link to {email}. Please click the link to confirm your address and sign in.
verify.no_email: No email in your inbox? Check your spam folder or <link>try a different email address</link>.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Manage your account and listings on {siteName}.

table.empty_state: No listings found. Submit or claim a listing to get started.

blog.title: Blog

error.title: Something went wrong!
error.description: Please try again. If the problem persists, <link>contact support</link>.

not_found.title: 404 Not Found
not_found.description: We're sorry, but the page could not be found. You may have mistyped the address or the page may have moved.

submit.title: Add a free listing
submit.description: Listing on {siteName} is a great way to get more exposure. We only publish high-quality listings that are useful to the community.

expedite.title: Choose a plan for {name}
expedite.description: Maximize {name}'s impact from day one. Select a package that suits your goals—from free listing to premium features.

featured.title: Thank you for your payment!
featured.description: We've received your payment. {name} should be featured on {siteName} shortly.

success.title: Thank you for submitting {name}!

hero.subtitle: Martial arts training, tournaments, and community — all in one place.

programs.title: Programs & Classes
programs.description: Structured curriculum for all ages and skill levels. Track progress from white belt to black belt.

tournaments.title: Tournaments
tournaments.description: Register, compete, and track rankings across local and national events.

community.title: Community
community.description: Connect with fellow martial artists. Share knowledge, find training partners, and grow together.

value.title: Why Baseline?
value.point1: Built by martial artists, for martial artists
value.point2: Modern platform — no outdated paper forms or spreadsheets
value.point3: One membership, full access to programs, events, and community
